tree.name: Kentavious Caldwell-Pope
tree.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Desmond Bane and a 2026 1st round pick swap to Orlando for KCP, Cole Anthony, 2025 1st (ORL own, 16th pick Yang Hansen), 2028 1st (ORL own), 2029 1st pick swap, and 2030 1st (ORL own)
tree.note: Georgia guard, acquired from Orlando in Desmond Bane trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Desmond Bane
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MEM sent 2023 2nd (Keyonte Johnson) and 2025 2nd (MEM own, Kobe Sanders) to BOS, cash to POR; BOS sent Bane (#30 pick) to MEM; POR sent Mario Hezonja to MEM
assetsGivenUp.note: TCU guard, drafted 30th overall by Boston Celtics, traded to MEM in 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#49)
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis' own 2023 2nd round pick equivalent, sent to Boston in Bane trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#55)
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis' own 2025 2nd round pick, sent to Boston in Bane trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to Portland in 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 1st Round Pick Swap Rights
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis' own 2026 first-round pick swap rights, sent to Orlando
